name: Orange Glazed Winter Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the carrots, parsnips, and broccoli stalks. Halve them lengthwise.
2. Roll-cut the vegetables.
3. Steam all the vegetables until they are tender-crisp.
4. In a large skillet, cook the remaining ingredients (except salt, pepper, and sesame seeds) over moderately high heat. Cook until thick and syrupy, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the steamed vegetables, season with salt and pepper, and gently toss to mix.
6. Serve hot or at room temperature sprinkled with toasted sesame seeds.
